actionConfiguration.body:
SELECT * FROM (
	SELECT 
	'PART' AS kind,
	p.id AS ref,
	p.part_id AS code,
	p.part_id AS part_number,
	p.part_name AS part_name,
	p.part_id || ' · ' || p.part_name || ' (Part)' AS label,
	CASE WHEN wi_edit.id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS is_current_wip
	FROM upper_part p
	LEFT JOIN upper_wip_input wi_edit 
	ON wi_edit.input_kind = 'PART' 
	AND wi_edit.input_ref = p.id 
	AND wi_edit.wip_id = NULLIF({{appsmith.store.editWipId}}, 0)
	WHERE p.session_id = (SELECT id FROM v_current_session WHERE article_id = {{sel_article.selectedOptionValue}})
	AND (p.delta_flag IS NULL OR p.delta_flag != 'REMOVED')
	AND p.part_id NOT LIKE '%-%'
	AND (
		NOT EXISTS (
			SELECT 1 FROM upper_wip_input wi
			WHERE wi.input_kind = 'PART' 
			AND wi.input_ref = p.id
			AND wi.wip_id IS DISTINCT FROM NULLIF({{appsmith.store.editWipId}}, 0)
		)
		OR wi_edit.id IS NOT NULL
	)
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 
	'WIP' AS kind,
	w.id AS ref,
	CAST(w.id AS TEXT) AS code,
	'#' || CAST(w.id AS TEXT) AS part_number,
	w.label AS part_name,
	'#' || CAST(w.id AS TEXT) || ' · ' || w.label || ' (Package)' AS label,
	CASE WHEN wi_edit.id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS is_current_wip
	FROM upper_wip w
	LEFT JOIN upper_wip_input wi_edit
	ON wi_edit.input_kind = 'WIP'
	AND wi_edit.input_ref = w.id
	AND wi_edit.wip_id = NULLIF({{appsmith.store.editWipId}}, 0)
	WHERE w.session_id = (SELECT id FROM v_current_session WHERE article_id = {{sel_article.selectedOptionValue}})
	AND w.id IS DISTINCT FROM NULLIF({{appsmith.store.editWipId}}, 0)
	AND (
		NOT EXISTS (
			SELECT 1 FROM upper_wip_input wi
			WHERE wi.input_kind = 'WIP'
			AND wi.input_ref = w.id
			AND wi.wip_id IS DISTINCT FROM NULLIF({{appsmith.store.editWipId}}, 0)
		)
		OR wi_edit.id IS NOT NULL
	)
) AS pool
ORDER BY 
  is_current_wip DESC,
  kind,
  SPLIT_PART(code, '-', 1)::int,
  CASE WHEN code LIKE '%-%' THEN SPLIT_PART(code, '-', 2)::int ELSE 0 END;
